title: Exile (disambiguation)
content:
'''Exile''' may mean:

==[[Canon]]==
*[[Exile (punishment)|'''Exile''']], a state of banishment
*The '''[[Pre-Exile Masters]]''', [[Artist|painters]] who lived before the [[Imperial Era]].

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*[[Exile (punishment)/Legends|'''Exile''']], a state of banishment
*[[Meetra Surik]], a former [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] also known as the '''Jedi Exile'''
*The '''[[Exiles]]''', exiled [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] who conquered the [[Sith (species)/Legends|Sith]] [[Species/Legends|species]] and formed the [[Sith/Legends|Sith Order]]
*The '''[[Exile fleet]]''', which was led by the [[Tenebrae|Sith Emperor]] to form a [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|reconstituted Sith Empire]] after the [[Great Hyperspace War/Legends|Great Hyperspace War]]
*'''[[Allya's Exile]]''', a powerful [[Color/Legends|red]] [[Lightsaber crystal/Legends|lightsaber crystal]]
*The '''[[Kanzer Exiles]]''', a fanatically religious organization

==[[In-universe|Out-of-universe]]==
*'''''[[Exiles of the Force]]''''', a proposed [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] series
*'''''[[Legacy of the Force: Exile]]''''', the fourth installment of the ''[[Star Wars: Legacy of the Force]]'' novel series
*'''[[Luke exile motif]]''', a [[Musical score|leitmotif]] representing [[Luke Skywalker]]'s exile on [[Ahch-To]]

{{Disambig}}
